description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a medium gray fabric. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape. Two dark blue throw pillows are placed on each side, adding a subtle accent to the otherwise monochromatic palette. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, geometric profile. The legs are short, cylindrical, and metallic, positioned at each corner for stability and a contemporary touch. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, metallic legs, and two dark blue accent pillows. The design is minimalist and functional, with uniform cushions and a clean, boxy silhouette.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight armrest, two blue pillows, and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the two seat and back cushions, as well as the placement of the blue pillows on each side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the straight armrest and the alignment of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, continuous back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all rectangular and closely fitted; two loose, square blue throw pillows placed at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at full seat height, with a flat profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical metallic legs positioned at each corner, exposed and with a simple, modern finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-high, straight backrest composed of two separate rectangular cushions, continuous across the width with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a subtle, fine texture; no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
